name: Ricoh PENTAX WG-1000 Digital Camera
description: Capture scenes in demanding conditions with the gray, olive PENTAX WG-1000 Digital Camera from Ricoh. Constructed to withstand depths as deep as 49.2', the WG-1000 is waterproof, IP6X dustproof, and shockproof to drops from as high as 6.5'.

features.Key Features: 16.35MP BSI CMOS Sensor | 4x Optical Zoom Lens | 27-108mm (Full-Frame Equivalent) | Seven Capture Modes | Twenty Personalized Color Modes | Shock, Dust & Waterproof | 2.7" 230K-Dot LCD Monitor | ISO 100-3200 | Full HD Movie Recording in H.264 | Electronic Shake Reduction
features.What’s In The Box: 1x Ricoh PENTAX WG-1000 Digital Camera (Gray/Olive) | 1x Ricoh D-LI96 Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery | 1x Ricoh O-CC180 Protector Jacket | 1x Ricoh O-ST180 Carabiner Strap | 1x Ricoh I-USB180 USB Cable for PENTAX WG-1000 Digital Camera | 1x Wrist Strap | 1x USB Power Adapter | 1x Power Plug
